Wash mushrooms, then cut into a rough chop
In a rondeaux, cook mushrooms with butter and truffle oil until tender
Deglaze with tamari, then add cream, sugar, and salt.
Bring mixture to a boil and maintain ~20 minutes or until thickened and consistent
Use a large immersion blender to blend the mixture smooth
Fold in Marscapone and simmer for ~10 more minutes or until thickened to correct consistency
Add Mother #2, then begin blending in batches in a vitamix blender until smooth
Reserve in cambro containers, cool in blast chiller or ice bath, then store in cooler.
